message:
build(frankenterm-core): add jsonschema dev-dep for robot envelope conformance (ft-5ikbd)

Adds `jsonschema = { version = "0.21", default-features = false }` to
the dev-dependencies block. Pure-Rust validator with no system deps,
supporting Draft 2020-12 — which is the schema dialect declared in the
committed wa-robot-*.json header files.

The dependency is dev-only (lives under [dev-dependencies], not
[dependencies]) so nothing in the production crate graph picks it up.
default-features = false avoids dragging in the optional reqwest-based
remote-$ref resolver that we have no need for; all schemas under test
are read from the local fixtures tree.

Used by ft-5ikbd's runtime conformance test that validates every
robot-envelope golden under crates/frankenterm-core/tests/
golden_robot_envelope/ against the committed schema, catching drift
between the schema, the goldens, and the live emitter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
